title: [Epic] Address Technical Debt and Code Smells in SDK
body: This epic tracks the implementation of fixes for identified code smells, linter warnings, and architectural tech debt in the @liferay/accelerator-sdk.

issues.title: [Tech Debt] Fix getAccountGroups parameter forwarding mismatch
issues.body:
In `src/liferay/index.cjs`, the `getAccountGroups` method destructures `pageSize` and `fields` but fails to pass them to `this.rest._get`.

Steps to resolve:
1. Locate `getAccountGroups` in `src/liferay/index.cjs`.
2. Forward `pageSize` and `fields` to `this.rest._get` options object under `params`.
3. Verify with unit tests.

issues.title: [Tech Debt] Clean up unused catch bindings and test warnings
issues.body:
There are several style violations and linter warnings in scripts and test files.

Steps to resolve:
1. In `scripts/gh-issue-sync.cjs` and `tests/mcp.test.js`, replace unused `catch (e)` with modern optional catch bindings `catch {}`.
2. In `tests/mcp.test.js`, fix the unused `code` argument in the process `'close'` handler.
3. In `tests/resilience.test.mjs`, fix the unused `callbackUrl` argument.
4. Run `yarn lint` to confirm zero violations.

issues.title: [Tech Debt] Integrate PimSkuFirstAdapter into CatalogAdapterFactory
issues.body:
Currently, `CatalogAdapterFactory` has a fallback placeholder that returns `LegacyProductFirstAdapter` even if PIM capability is detected.

Steps to resolve:
1. Develop `PimSkuFirstAdapter` (implementing PIM-specific operations).
2. Register and instantiate `PimSkuFirstAdapter` in `CatalogAdapterFactory` when `/o/headless-pim/v1.0/openapi.json` is successfully probed.

issues.title: [Tech Debt] Modularize GeneratedLiferayClient split by API namespaces
issues.body:
`GeneratedLiferayClient.cjs` is a monolithic 1.2MB file containing all bound endpoints. We should split it to improve modularity and load performance.

Steps to resolve:
1. Refactor `scripts/generate-client.js` to output individual API-scoped client files (e.g., `headlessDeliveryClient.cjs`, `headlessCommerceCatalogClient.cjs`).
2. Modify `GeneratedLiferayClient.cjs` to act as a lightweight loader/facade of these split clients.

issues.title: [Tech Debt] Implement generic async page iterator in LiferayRestService
issues.body:
Consuming methods in `LiferayService` repeatedly duplicate pagination loops using `_collectAllItems`.

Steps to resolve:
1. Implement a generic async generator/iterator `async *iteratePages(...)` on `LiferayRestService` to handle page-by-page REST requests.
2. Refactor existing service list methods to consume the generic iterator, simplifying the code.
